case_title: MEABD LLC VS. JOSE GARCIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEABD LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 237 LEAVENWORTH STREET, #306 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, *** APPLIES TO ANY/ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 72578955)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEABD LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 72578955) AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEABD LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 72483882), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEABD LLC SERVED MAR-06-2024, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 72483882), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEABD LLC SERVED MAR-06-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE
DECLARATION OF RENTAL AGREEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 72578955) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEABD LLC
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE-UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 72578955) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEABD LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOSE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $43.51 (TRANSACTION ID # 73634361) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEABD LLC
